2130670.description:
Get ready for a relentless test of reflexes and focus. In this fast-paced arcade challenge, you are constantly accelerating forward. Your only hope is to dodge the endless stream of blocks that stand between you and the next round.

Reach 10,000 distance to advance to the next round, where the obstacles grow tougher. Round after round, the pressure builds. How long can you survive?

Features

  • Constant acceleration – the longer you last, the faster you go.

  • Dodge or crash – weave through unpredictable block formations.

  • Endless challenge – every 10K brings a new, harder round.

  • Skill-based progression – no luck, just pure reflex and focus.

Simple to pick up, brutally hard to master. Can you outlast the acceleration and conquer the endless run?
2130670.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
